title: Enakena Lyrics in Tamil & English Meaning | Love Insurance Kompany (LIK) | Anirudh

sections.intro: Experience the heartbreaking magic of Enakenna Yaarum Illaye, the reimagined anthem from the much-anticipated film Love Insurance Kompany (LIK). Directed by Vignesh Shivan and featuring the visual brilliance of Ravi Varman, this track brings together the iconic vocals of Anirudh Ravichander and Ananthakr. A poetic journey into the depths of longing and destiny.
sections.easterEgg:
Hidden Details You Missed! 🕵️‍♂️

  • Originally released for the delayed project 'Aakko', this song was so iconic that it was brought back into 'Love Insurance Kompany' to serve a new narrative purpose.
  • The collaboration between Anirudh and Vignesh Shivan has a 100% success rate, and this track is considered the 'soul' of the LIK soundtrack.
  • Cinematographer Ravi Varman used specialized anamorphic lenses for this song's visuals to capture the loneliness of the protagonist in wide, expansive cityscapes.
sections.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is Love Insurance Kompany (LIK)?

LIK is a romantic comedy film directed by Vignesh Shivan starring Pradeep Ranganathan and SJ Suryah, with music by Anirudh.

Who is Ananthakr in this song?

Ananthakr is a talented playback singer and musician who frequently collaborates with Anirudh Ravichander on background scores and vocal harmonies.

tamilStanzas:
கடல் தாண்டி போகும் காதலி
கை மீறி போகுதே என் விதி
நகராமல் நின்று போகுமே
என் வாழ்க்கையின் கதி (2)

பாதி காதல் தந்த பெண்ணே மீதியும் வேண்டும்
நீ போன பின்னும் எந்தன் மனமோ இருண்டுதான் போகும்

காத்திரு என்று நீ சொல்லி போனால் அதுவே போதும்
மறந்திரு என்று நீ சொல்லி நேர்ந்தால் உயிரே போகும்

போதை நீதானே தள்ளாடுறேன் நானே
உன் காமம் வேணாமே உன் காதல் போதுமே (2)

கடல் தாண்டி போகும் காதலி
கை மீறி போகுதே என் விதி
நகராமல் நின்று போகுமே
என் வாழ்க்கையின் கதி (2)

பாதி காதல் தந்த பெண்ணே மீதியும் வேண்டும்
நீ போன பின்னும் எந்தன் மனமோ இருண்டுதான் போகும்

காத்திரு என்று நீ சொல்லி போனால் அதுவே போதும்
மறந்திரு என்று நீ சொல்லி நேர்ந்தால் உயிரே போகும்

போதை நீதானே தள்ளாடுறேன் நானே
உன் காமம் வேணாமே உன் காதல் போதுமே
englishStanzas:
enakenna yaarum illayae unakkadhu thonavillayae

[I have no one for myself, but that doesn't seem to occur to you.]


kadal thandi pogum kadhali kai meeri pogudhey en vidhi nagaraamal nindru pogumey en vazhkayin gadhi

[My lover is traveling across the sea; my fate is slipping out of my hands. The course of my life will come to a standstill.]


paadhi kadhal thandha penne meedhiyum vendum nee pona pinnum endhan manamo irunduthaan pogum

[O girl who gave me half a love, I need the rest too. After you leave, my heart will be shrouded in darkness.]


Kaathiru endru nee solli ponaal adhuve podhum Marandhiru endru nee solli nerndhaal uyire pogum

[If you tell me to 'Wait' before leaving, that's enough. If you happen to say 'Forget me', my life will end.]


bodha needhaaney thallaaduren naaney unn kaamam venaamey unn kaadhal podhumey

[You are my intoxication, and I am stumbling. I don't want your lust; your love is more than enough.]


enakenna yaarum illayae unakkadhu thonavillayae

[I truly have no one else, but you don't seem to realize it.]

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Enakena?

The song Enakena explores themes of love and longing, expressing deep emotions through its lyrics.

What is the plot context of the song in Love Insurance Kompany?

In Love Insurance Kompany, the song captures a pivotal moment of romance between the lead characters, enhancing the emotional depth of their relationship.

Who are the singers and music director of the song?

The song is sung by Ananthakr and Anirudh Ravichander, with music composed by Anirudh Ravichander himself.

When was Enakena released?

Enakena was released on February 14, 2026, coinciding with Valentine's Day.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Enakena from Love Insurance Kompany beautifully encapsulates the essence of romantic love. With its melodious tune and heartfelt lyrics, it conveys the emotions of longing and connection between lovers. The duet by Ananthakr and Anirudh Ravichander adds a layer of charm, making it a perfect fit for celebrations of love. This track is sure to evoke feelings of joy and nostalgia, resonating with anyone who has experienced the magic of romance.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Enakena is a captivating romantic duet that beautifully showcases the chemistry between Ananthakr and Anirudh Ravichander. With Vignesh Shivan's heartfelt lyrics and Anirudh's enchanting music, this song from the upcoming Love Insurance Kompany is sure to resonate with lovers everywhere. Experience the magic of love through this melodious track that promises to be a highlight of the year!
stanzaMeanings: I have no one but you, you don't have any feelings for me.
The love that crosses the sea, the beloved's hand is slipping away, my fate is stuck without moving, my life's path is blocked.
Half the love given by a girl is needed. Even after you leave, my heart will still remain.
If you say 'wait', that is enough. If you say 'forget', then my life will leave.
I have no one but you, you don't have any feelings for me.
I won't let go of you, I need your desire, your love is enough for me.
The love that crosses the sea, the beloved's hand is slipping away, my fate is stuck without moving, my life's path is blocked.
